title: My Paramour was Loneliness
content:
My paramour was loneliness
    And lying by the sea,
    Soft songs of sorrow and distress
    He did beget in me.

    Later another lover came
    More meet for my desire,
    "Radiant Beauty" was his name;
    His sons had wings of fire!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Laurence Hope (Adela Florence Cory Nicolson) delivers a powerful performance in "My Paramour was Loneliness"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
